password.title: Password
password.description: Ensure password is correct, othersise a reset may become necessary.

threshold.title: Filter Change Warning Percentage
threshold.description: Show Change Filter warning once Filter Life reaches this value.

silentAuto.title: Auto defaults to Quiet
silentAuto.description: Default value only: when a device is switched to Auto from its purifier tile, start in Quiet (silent) rather than Standard. Air Pro only. If the Quiet Mode switch below is enabled, it can override this live.

quietMode.title: Expose Quiet Mode switch
quietMode.description: Add a 'Quiet Mode' switch to the purifier (Air Pro only) — a live toggle for Quiet (silent) mode. Turning it on enables Auto + Quiet. Independent of the default above; the two stay in sync. Ungroup in the Home app for its own tile.

co2Threshold.title: CO₂ Alarm Threshold (ppm)
co2Threshold.description: CO₂ level (ppm) above which the CO₂ sensor reports an abnormal/detected state.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh device state from the Molekule API. Changes made from HomeKit update instantly; this controls how quickly changes made elsewhere (physical controls, the Molekule app, air-quality drift) are reflected.
